configurePresets.name: release-portable
configurePresets.description: Default daily-driver. Brew FLINT via pkg-config (portable across Apple Silicon variants). Replaces legacy build/.

configurePresets.name: release-tuned
configurePresets.description: Apple Silicon tuned: -O3 -mcpu=apple-m4. Static FLINT for distribution. Replaces legacy build-mcpu-tuned/ + build-release/.

configurePresets.name: release-dist
configurePresets.displayName: Release (portable, static FLINT, OMP + mimalloc), distribution CLI
configurePresets.description: Distribution build for the CLI: -O3 (no -mcpu tuning, runs on M1+), static FLINT/GMP/MPFR for both CLI and LibraryLink dylib. HF_FLINT_STATIC_ARCHIVE must be passed via -D (built by scripts/build_static_flint.sh with WANT_LTO=1).

configurePresets.name: release-tuned-pgo-gen
configurePresets.description: First half of PGO workflow: -fprofile-generate. After build, run the training workload, then `llvm-profdata merge -output=...merged.profdata default*.profraw` to feed release-tuned-pgo. Replaces legacy build-pgogen/.

configurePresets.name: release-tuned-pgo
configurePresets.description: Second half of PGO workflow: -fprofile-use against /tmp/hf_pgo_profiles_2026_05/merged.profdata (must exist; produced by release-tuned-pgo-gen + llvm-profdata merge). Replaces legacy build-pgouse/.

configurePresets.name: asan
configurePresets.description: HF_ASAN=ON (address + undefined sanitizers). OMP disabled to keep ASan reports clean. Replaces legacy build-asan/.

configurePresets.name: tsan
configurePresets.description: HF_TSAN=ON, OMP on (purpose: find OMP races). Replaces legacy build-tsan/ + build-tsan-fold/.

configurePresets.name: librarylink-shared
configurePresets.displayName: LibraryLink .dylib (static deps, OMP=OFF for Wolfram-libomp compatibility)
configurePresets.description: Builds hyperflint_librarylink.dylib for Mathematica. OMP off (Wolfram's own libomp must not race brew libomp). Static FLINT/GMP/MPFR to avoid dyld symbol-resolution race documented in notes/benchmark_1massDB/segfault_diagnosis.md.

configurePresets.name: debug
configurePresets.description: Supplementary (not in §10 spec). Standard Debug build for source-level debugging. Replaces legacy build-debug/.

configurePresets.name: debug-nomi
configurePresets.description: Supplementary (not in §10 spec). Debug without mimalloc for system-allocator heap attribution (iter-13 ruled heap(1) cannot see mimalloc). Replaces legacy build-debug-gcd/.

configurePresets.name: profile
configurePresets.description: Supplementary (not in §10 spec). Release-with-debug-info for xctrace/samply attribution. Replaces legacy build-profile/.
